title: Write a Requirements Document
tagline: Write a BRD for adding a loyalty programme to a retail POS system.
scenario: A mid-size South African retailer (40 stores) wants to add a loyalty programme to their existing POS system. Customers earn points on purchases and redeem them for discounts. The operations director has described the idea verbally — now it needs to be documented.
brief: Write a Business Requirements Document (BRD) that captures the business need, scope, functional requirements, non-functional requirements, and assumptions.
deliverables: A BRD covering: business objectives, scope (in/out), at least 10 functional requirements, and 5 non-functional requirements
An assumptions and constraints section with at least 5 items
A RACI matrix for key stakeholders (Operations, IT, Marketing, Finance)
submissionGuidance: Requirements must be testable. "The system should be fast" is not a requirement. "The loyalty balance must display within 2 seconds of scanning the card" is.

rubric.label: BRD Structure
rubric.description: Does the document follow a professional BRD structure?

rubric.label: Requirements Quality
rubric.description: Are the requirements specific, measurable, and testable?

rubric.label: Scope Clarity
rubric.description: Is the in-scope/out-of-scope boundary clear and realistic?

rubric.label: RACI Matrix
rubric.description: Is the RACI complete with no shared accountabilities?
